description:
## Question

Implement the locked design and land it.

- Create darwin-modules/features/voice.nix + wire in features/default.nix; add `voice` to the feature seam and to all Macs (per ticket 2).
- Add the superwhisper cask; port the hooks, toggle skill, and statusline indicator per tickets 3/4/5.
- git add new files (flakes only see tracked files), build (home-test / system-test), activate, verify on a Mac.
- Handle/notualize TCC (mic + accessibility) grants — likely a manual note per the map's Not-yet-specified.

This is the destination endpoint: execution carried into the map.
title: Build and activate the voice integration
